question_text: In the electrochemical cell shown below, identify the electrode where oxidation occurs.

answer_key.explanation: In a galvanic cell, oxidation occurs at the anode; the visual labels zinc as the anode.

visual.caption: Galvanic cell stimulus with electrodes, salt bridge, and electron-flow direction.
visual.altText: A zinc anode in zinc sulfate and copper cathode in copper sulfate connected by a salt bridge.
